projectDescription: A prediction market trading platform that aggregates markets from Polymarket and Kalshi, offering spot trading, paper options (calls, puts, and selling premium), narrative baskets, portfolio tracking, and a social leaderboard.
keyFeatures: Unified prediction market feed from Polymarket and Kalshi
Paper options trading — calls, puts, and selling premium on prediction markets
Narrative baskets — trade a curated group of related markets as one position
Real-time portfolio tracking across all platforms with P&L charts
Watchlist with price alerts and trending market discovery
Social leaderboard for live and paper trading performance
Embedded wallet via Privy — no external wallet needed
Deposit and withdraw USDC across Polygon and Solana
publicApiSurface: markets.list — fetch all active markets from Polymarket and Kalshi
markets.daily — fetch markets expiring today or tomorrow
markets.getById — get a single market by ID
markets.getEvent — get all markets under a shared event
markets.priceHistory — OHLC price history for a market (1D/1W/1M/1Y/ALL)
markets.orderbook — live bid/ask orderbook for a market
trading.buy / trading.sell — execute spot trades on Polymarket or Kalshi
options.getOptions — list options series available for trading
optionsTrading.buy — buy a call or put option contract
optionsTrading.sell — write (sell) an option to collect premium
narratives.buy / narratives.sell — trade a narrative basket
portfolio.overview — portfolio value, buying power, and positions summary
portfolio.history — portfolio value snapshots over time
